name: Aerial Robotics Club at NC State
summary: We build planes that fly themselves! If you are interested in joining either drop by our lab in room 2003 EBIII right off of the main lobby and/or attend one of our meetings on Wednesdays at 6:30pm in room 2003, EBIII.

name: African American Textile Society at NC State
summary: The purpose of this organization shall be to provide minority students enrolled in the Wilson College of Textiles as well as outside programs a network of social, and professional opportunities that will enhance their overall college experience.

name: Air & Waste Management Association - Student Chapter at NC State University
summary: We are the NC State student chapter of the Air & Waste Management Association, a global professional organization. A&WMA promotes global environmental responsibility and increases the effectiveness of orgs to make critical decisions that benefit society.

name: Alexander Hamilton Scholars Program
summary: The Alexander Hamilton Scholars Program is a unique opportunity for undergraduate students offered jointly by the Poole College of Management and the College of Humanities and Social Sciences at North Carolina State University.

name: Alpha Chi Sigma- Gamma Xi Chapter
summary: Professional Chemistry Fraternity

name: Alpha Kappa Psi
summary: We are a co-ed professional business fraternity with a deep history throughout the United States and around the world. Whether you are studying engineering, communications, or all of the above, Alpha Kappa Psi may have something for you!

name: Alpha Pi Mu at NC State
summary: Throughout the field of Industrial Engineering, Alpha Pi Mu is a highly recognized society, identifying its members as being the top of their class. Alpha Pi Mu serves to promote the field of Industrial Engineering through various activities.

name: Alpha Tau Omega
summary: An American Leadership fraternity that annually ranks among the top ten national fraternities for number of chapters, and total number of members. ATO gives you the opportunity to find a family away from home and connect with people in a meaningful way.

name: American Concrete Institute - Student Chapter
summary: The American Concrete Institute - Student Chapter, or ACI, is a student organization focusing on concrete structures and design. The team travels to international ACI certified competitions to present their projects against other ACI student chapters.

name: American Institute of Aeronautics and Astronautics
summary: The American Institute of Aeronautics and Astronautics (AIAA) is the world's largest technical society dedicated to the global aerospace profession.

name: American Institute of Chemical Engineers
summary: AIChE is a professional student-led organization for chemical engineers that focuses on professional development, leadership, networking, continuing education, as well as social service and outreach.

name: American Marketing Association at NC State
summary: The NC State American Marketing Association is the largest business organization at NC State. We are the university's #1 source for marketing and professional development topics, including networking, LinkedIn, interviewing, and more!

name: American Society of Civil Engineers
summary: This organization is a student chapter of the American Society of Civil Engineers (ASCE). ASCE is the United States' oldest civil engineering society.

name: Arnold Air Society
summary: The Arnold Air Society is a professional, honorary and service organization advocating the support of aerospace power.

name: Art2Wear
summary: A student organized runway show that presents fashion, costume, and sartorial sculpture created by the students NC State University.

name: Asian Students Association
summary: The Asian Students Association was established to serve as a cultural organization that promotes cultural awareness, social networking, community, and personal development.

name: Association for Women in Mathematics Student Chapter
summary: The purpose of the Association for Women in Mathematics is to encourage women & girls to study and to have active careers in the mathematical sciences, & to promote equal opportunity and the equal treatment of women and girls in the mathematical sciences

name: Astronomy Club at NC State University
summary: The Astronomy Club at NC State aims to provide students and members with the resources necessary for observing celestial objects and events, and to encourage a strong appreciation for astronomy and the sciences in general.

name: Bangladesh Student Association
summary: Bangladesh Student Association (BSA) at NC State University is a platform for students and faculty to come together, celebrate, and represent Bangladeshi culture through different cultural activities.

name: Beta Alpha Psi - Iota Omega Chapter
summary: Beta Alpha Psi is an international honors organization for IT, Finance, Accounting students and professionals. Beta Alpha Psi provides students with opportunities for professional development, networking and community service.

name: Biochemistry Club at North Carolina State University
summary: The mission of the Biochemistry Club is to foster fellowship and networking, stimulate interest in biochemistry, and provide academic support and career advice to students.

name: Biological & Agricultural Engineering GSA
summary: The purpose of the BAE GSA is to represent the graduate student body within the Department of Biological and Agricultural Engineering while promoting professional interest and fellowship among BAE graduate students.

name: Black Business Students Association
summary: The purpose of the Black Business Students Association (BBSA) is to assist in the academic, personal, and professional development of our members.

name: Chemical and Biomolecular Engineering Graduate Student Association
summary: We are composed of all the graduate students in the CBE department at NCSU. Our purpose is to give our members an active voice in departmental matters and to promote and foster unity within the graduate community through seminars and social gathering.

name: Civil Engineering Graduate Student Association
summary: Purpose of CEGSA is to represent the graduate students in the Department of Civil, Construction, and Environmental Engineering.

name: Communication, Rhetoric and Digital Media Student Association
summary: The purpose of this organization is to promote the academic and professional development of graduate students in the CRDM doctoral program and to give graduate students a platform to meet, learn, and share information and knowledge with their peers.

name: Computer Science Graduate Student Association
summary: The Computer Science Graduate Student Association represents and serves the Graduate Student body of the Computer Science Department at North Carolina State University.

name: CSLEPS - Leadership In Action (LIA)
summary: The Leadership In Action (LIA) program serves as the Center for Student Leadership, Ethics & Public Service premier leadership program.

name: Delta Gamma
summary: Delta Gamma was founded in 1873 at the Lewis School for Girls in Mississippi. Our Fraternity is based on values, sisterhood, scholarship, philanthropy and a social responsibility to the community. Our philanthropy is Service for Sight.

name: Earthquake Engineering Research Institute Student Chapter at North Carolina State University
summary: The goal of the organization is to study and practice earthquake engineering in the university and community in order to protect people and property from the effects of earthquakes.

name: Engineers' Council
summary: Engineers' Council is the student council for the College of Engineering. As the umbrella organization for undergraduate engineering groups, we plan and execute college events, appropriate funds, and bridge the gap between faculty and students.

name: Engineers Without Borders
summary: EWB-NCSU is a student organization dedicated to building a better world through engineering projects that empower communities to meet their basic human needs.

name: Eta Kappa Nu
summary: Eta Kappa Nu is a unique membership organization dedicated to encouraging and recognizing excellence in the electrical and computer engineering field.

name: Fulbright Student Association
summary: The Fulbright Student Association at NC State is meant to best represent the goals of the Fulbright program. Our mission is to provide a peer support network for current and upcoming Fulbright Students and Scholars in North Carolina.

name: Genetics Club
summary: The Genetics Club is for anyone who wants to learn more about genetics, new research, opportunities on campus, and professionals around the Triangle. All majors are welcome.

name: Geo-Institute Graduate Student Organization at the North Carolina State University
summary: The mission of Student Organization of the Geo-Institute is to be a student- led body that functions to enhance the educational and personal experience of students in the geo-engineering community at North Carolina State University.

name: Geology Club @ NC State
summary: The mission of our club is to promote an increasing knowledge of the Geological sciences, to both benefit students in their careers and endeavors in geology and to educate and support the community.

name: Graduate Association of Public Administration
summary: The Graduate Association of Public Administration (GAPA) sponsors professional, social, and community service activities during the academic year. GAPA offers students networking opportunities to discuss issues surrounding public administration.

name: Grains of Time
summary: Grains of Time is NC State's premier male a cappella group. The purpose of this organization is to provide a cappella singing for university and community functions.

name: Greater Good Textile Group
summary: Student advocates for ethical fashion through fair labor practices, sustainability, and community outreach projects.

name: Herpetology Club at NC State
summary: The Herpetology Club at North Carolina State University is a group for those who have a common interest in reptiles and amphibians and their research.

name: Higher Education Masters Association
summary: The purpose of the association shall be to enhance the development of the HEMA student body by facilitating communication among the students, departmental faculty, and staff, and North Carolina State University.

name: Horticultural Science Graduate Student Association
summary: This organization aids in the professional development, support, as well as intellectual growth and development of horticultural science graduate students.

name: ISE Graduate Student Association at NC State
summary: The ISE GSA is for all graduate students in the Edward P. Fitts Department of Industrial and Systems Engineering. The organization supports the success of each student by enhancing community through social events and as a liaison to the dept. faculty.

name: HackPack
summary: Our goal is to cultivate a friendly environment where students can learn and practice security concepts judgement-free. We provide learning resources, host weekly practice challenges, and compete in monthly security Capture The Flag (CTF) competitions.

name: Institute of Industrial & Systems Engineers
summary: We are a student organization for prospective or current students in Industrial & Systems Engineering. The Chapter shall promote membership in IISE by acquainting the student body with the ideas, purposes and objectives of IISE.

name: Interfraternity Council
summary: The purpose of this organization shall be to provide a vital and articulate instrument for member Fraternities in order to secure harmony in Inter-Fraternity relationships, to promote the welfare of students within the individual fraternities.

name: Korean Student Association
summary: The KSA is always trying to reach out to all the people that have to do with NCSU and/or Korea.

name: Ladies in Red
summary: The Ladies in Red are NC State's premier all-women A Cappella group, established in 1993. The Ladies work to empower and inspire others through song. The group is student-led with support from the NC State Performing Arts and Technology Department.

name: Lambda Chi Alpha Fraternity
summary: A values-based fraternity whose mission is to improve the lives of its members and the community that surrounds them.

name: Leopold Wildlife Club
summary: Dedicated to wildlife conservation and exposing students to wildlife professionals as well as career development opportunities.

name: Linux Users Group (LUG)
summary: We are the Linux Users Group at North Carolina State University, created for the purpose of promoting and supporting the use of Linux and related Free and Open Source programs within the NC State campus community.

name: MAITRI - Indian Graduate Student Association
summary: Indian Graduate Student Association

name: Marine, Earth, and Atmospheric Sciences GSA
summary: The goal of this organization is to provide resources for graduate students in the Marine, Earth, and Atmospheric Sciences Department, and to initiate opportunities for social interactions.

name: Master of International Studies Graduate Student Association
summary: This association represents the graduate student body in the Master of International Studies program.

name: Materials Science & Engineering Graduate Student Association
summary: The department of materials science & engineering chapter of the Graduate Student Association (GSA).

name: Mathematics Graduate Student Association
summary: The Mathematics Graduate Student Association represents the graduate student body of the Mathematics Department at NC State.

name: Mechanical and Aerospace Engineering GSA
summary: The MAE Graduate Student Association is the primary graduate student advocacy group within the department. The association serves as an intermediary between the department and its graduate students for any and all concerns.

name: Men's Ultimate Club
summary: We are the Men's Ultimate Club. We host tryouts the first week of the Fall semester. We invite any student to tryout and join one of our teams, with no experience required!

name: Microbiology Undergraduate Club at NC State
summary: Open to all majors, the club aims to  engage students interested in microbiology and its applications.

name: Microbiology Graduate Student Association
summary: Graduate student association for professional development and social networking of graduate students studying or researching microbiology or related science fields.

name: National Society of Black Engineers
summary: Our mission is "To increase the number of culturally responsible Black engineers who excel academically, succeed professionally and positively impact the community."

name: Nubian Message
summary: Nubian Message is the Black student publication at NC State. As stated in its original mission, Nubian Message emphasizes coverage of the African-American community, and also focuses on issues relevant to any underrepresented community at NC State.

name: Parks, Recreation, and Tourism Management Graduate Student Association
summary: This Graduate Student Association is for all graduate students who are pursuing a degree administered through the Department of Parks, Recreation and Tourism Management, or those who are under the advisement of PRTM faculty.

name: Finance Club
summary: The Finance Club at NC State provides networking and career development opportunities to undergraduate students. Email ncstatefinance@gmail.com to join the club.

name: PGA Golf Management Club at NC State
summary: The mission of the PGA Golf Management Club at NC State is to promote the general welfare of PGA Golf Management students.

name: Phi Psi National Textile Fraternity - Eta Chapter
summary:
Phi Psi is the only professional co-ed textile fraternity in the United States. The fraternity encourages high standards of work, fellowship and brotherhood, as well as strong character and integrity. 

Current active chapters: Alpha & Eta

name: Phi Sigma Nu
summary: Phi Sigma Nu American Indian Fraternity, Inc. is a brotherhood composed of undergraduate, graduate, and professional men nationally, established on February 13, 1996, at the University of North Carolina at Pembroke.

name: Pi Alpha Xi
summary: Though an honor society, Pi Alpha Xi is more than a society. The organization was originally established to unify students, educators, and professional horticulturists.

name: Pi Beta Phi Fraternity
summary: The mission of Pi Beta Phi Fraternity for Women is to promote friendship, develop women of intellect and integrity, cultivate leadership potential and enrich lives through community service.

name: Pi Kappa Alpha
summary: Pi Kappa Alpha will set the standard of integrity, intellect, and achievement for our members, host institutions, and the communities in which we live.

name: Pi Tau Sigma
summary: Mechanical Engineering Honor Society

name: Botany Club
summary: We are a club dedicated to plants in all their wonderful forms.

name: Plant Pathology Graduate Student Association
summary: The Plant Pathology Graduate Student Association acts as a liaison between the graduate students and the faculty of the Department of Plant Pathology.

name: Political Science Club at North Carolina State University
summary: The Political Science Club is a non-partisan, student-led organization that hosts discussions on current affairs, panel events with speakers, open floor debate, career development opportunities, and more!

name: Poole College of Management Peer Leaders
summary: The Poole College of Management Peer Leaders is an organization that seeks to foster a sense of community within the college by welcoming new students as well as providing one-on-one mentoring to First-Year & transfer students.

name: Public Relations Student Society of America at North Carolina State University
summary: This pre-professional organization exists to assist students by enhancing their education, broadening their network, and launching their career. This organization is not exclusive to public relations students. All academic disciplines are welcome!

name: Sigma Phi Epsilon Fraternity
summary: Sigma Phi Epsilon was founded at the University of Richmond on November 1, 1901, on the Cardinal Principles: Virtue, Diligence, and Brotherly Love.

name: Society for Biomaterials Student Chapter at North Carolina State University
summary: This group has been created to socialize and communicate with various disciplines at NC State who have the same burning desire of learning about bio materials...

name: Society for Industrial and Applied Mathematics Student Chapter
summary: The NCSU student chapter of SIAM provides a forum in which students at NCSU can pursue math research focused on applications in science and industry.

name: Society for Undergraduate Mathematics
summary: SUM Club is dedicated to bringing together the undergraduate math community through social, service, and academic programs. Our mission is to create a strong network between students, the Math Department, the College of Sciences, and the real world.

name: Society of American Foresters Chapter at NC State
summary: We are a student chapter of the Society of American Foresters, a national professional organization connecting with forestry professionals. Our goal is to support students entering the field by providing networking and development opportunities.

name: Society for Multicultural Scientists
summary: Our primary goal is to increase the recruitment, retention and graduation rates of students from groups underrepresented in areas of study in the College of Sciences.

name: Society of Physics Students
summary: The Society of Physics Students (SPS) is an organization for students interested in any field of physics, looking for collaboration and partnership in the form of guest speakers, service trips, research presentations,  networking, and more.

name: STARS Computing Corps
summary: The STARS@NCSU (Students & Technology in Academia, Research and Service) Student Computing Corps is a student organization that provides students with the opportunity to learn more about computer science careers...

name: Statistics Graduate Student Organization
summary: Statistics Graduate Student Association

name: Student Alumni Association
summary: The Student Alumni Association provides personal and professional mentorship benefits, including access to the NC Stace alumni network, opportunities for service and leadership, and numerous exciting events throughout the year!

name: Tau Beta Pi - NC Alpha Chapter
summary: Tau Beta Pi was founded in 1885 to recognize outstanding students across all fields of engineering who display both distinguished scholarship in technical fields and exemplary character.

name: Tau Kappa Epsilon
summary: Tau Kappa Epsilon Fraternity

name: Technical Association of the Pulp & Paper Industry
summary: The Student Chapter of TAPPI at NC State provides a link between the professional, business, and industrial areas of the Paper and Pulp Industry and students in NC State's Paper Science & Engineering Department!

name: Textile Technology and Engineering Society at NC State
summary: The goal of TTES is to build a network of motivated Textile Engineering and Textile Technology students, faculty, and alumni.

name: Philosophy Club at NC State
summary: The Philosophy Club aims to foster a more intelligent discussion on issues that face all members of our society.

name: Theta Tau Rho
summary: Theta Tau is the Professional Gender Inclusive Engineering Fraternity at NC State. Our main focuses are Professional Development, Brotherhood, and Service.

name: Toxicology Graduate Student Association
summary: The Toxicology Graduate Student Association (TGSA) represents students enrolled in or affiliated with the Toxicology Program in the Department of Biological Sciences.

name: University Activities Board
summary: By students, for student. Bringing you the best activities for over 30 years. UAB is your place for Student Activities. Speakers, Concerts, Films and everything in between.

name: Graduate Student Association
summary: GSA represents all NC State graduate students. We are currently only utilizing this system for the Exec board and OIT. Please feel free to visit our website - gsa.ncsu.edu - for more information about the NC State GSA. Thanks!

name: WKNC 88.1 FM HD-1/HD-2
summary: WKNC 88.1 FM HD-1/HD-2 is student-run non-commercial college radio, with students serving as on-air DJs, bloggers, videographers, podcasters, interviewers and reporters.

name: Environmental Student Association at NC State
summary: ESA promotes environmental awareness at North Carolina State University, completes student-led environmental initiatives, and connects with other universities, students, and local citizens to stimulate environmental advocacy in Wake County and beyond.

name: Women in Mechanical and Aerospace at NC State University
summary: We focus on empowering women in mechanical and aerospace disciplines to succeed and advance in their field.

name: Women in Computer Science
summary: The mission of the Women in Computer Science (WiCS) program is to support, promote, and retain women in computer science by providing opportunities for personal and professional development, social interaction, and outreach.

name: Women in Nuclear at NC State
summary: Women in Nuclear is an organization for students in nuclear engineering and related fields to contribute to the building of a nuclear community. For example, the organization engages with youth, especially young females to explore nuclear technology.

name: Sounding Club at NC State University
summary: Sounding Club provides students with hands on experience with weather balloon launches and equipment that aids in weather forecasting. The club meets for regularly scheduled launches as well as spontaneous extreme weather events!

name: High-Powered Rocketry Club
summary: HPRC explores hobby rocketry and aerospace engineering to design rockets to compete in NASA's annual Student Launch competition. Join us!

name: Shelton Leadership Center Student Ambassador Program
summary: Connecting students who are interested in developing as values-based leaders through the mission of the Shelton Leadership Center

name: American Meteorological Society Student Chapter Organization at NC State
summary: A club designed for both students in the meteorology major and those with interdisciplinary connections. Members come to meetings in order to establish professional relationships and to listen to professional speakers in the field.

name: ASABE at NC State
summary: The student chapter of ASABE at NC State promotes professional and educational development for its members through bi-weekly meetings and other events while encouraging a sense of community amongst BAE/BAET students.

name: Operations Research GSA at NC State
summary: Our purpose is to enhance the quality of graduate education within the Operations Research Department of NC State by promoting involvement, networking, and communication among Operations Research graduate students and faculty members.

name: Internal Audit Student Club
summary: IASC is an exciting student run organization for students interested in careers in both private and public audit.  We offer students an opportunity to discover the dynamic internal audit profession that is continually broadening in scope and importance.

name: The Quarterdeck Society at NC State
summary: We are the student organization associated with Naval ROTC at NC State.

name: Indonesian Student Association at NC State
summary: Indonesian Students’ Association in the United States, North Carolina State University Chapter known as PERMIAS NCSU fosters communication among Indonesian students, promote cultural exchange, and build networks through academic and social activities

name: Society of Asian Scientists and Engineers at North Carolina State University
summary:
SASE’s mission is to:
- Prepare Asian heritage scientists and engineers for success in the global business world.
- Celebrate diversity on campus and in the workplace.
- Provide opportunities for members to contribute to their local communities.

name: Phi Gamma Delta
summary: Phi Gamma Delta IFC Social Fraternity

name: Multicultural Young Educators Network
summary: The purpose of MYEN is to provide diverse students with a platform in which to collaborate, address challenges in education, and develop as culturally competent 21st century educators through social programming and community service activities.

name: American Nuclear Society at North Carolina State University
summary: Connecting the nuclear industry with NC State's best!

name: Pack Abroad Ambassadors
summary: Pack Abroad Ambassadors is affiliated with the Study Abroad Office and aims to promote studying abroad to other students. PAA also offers opportunities to meet other students who have returned from studying abroad.

name: Musical Empowerment at NC State
summary: A nonprofit that pairs an NC State student instrumental musician or vocalist with a child from a low-income family and provides the child with a free instrument, free weekly music lesson, and positive mentorship.

name: Wolf Trax Music Group
summary: WTMG is the only student-run music management and promotions company on campus. We work with local artists to promote their music careers and book them shows around Raleigh, providing rare, real-world experience working in the music industry.

name: Turning Point USA at NC State
summary: Turning Point USA is one of the fastest growing youth movements in the country.  We use innovative campus activities and events as well as non-partisan, thought-provoking debate, dialogue, and discussion. To get youth involved in politics.

name: Masters of Accounting Student Organization
summary: We are a student organization comprised of NC State Jenkins Master of Accounting (MAC) Students who are organized for the purpose of representing all MAC students in the UGSA and ensuring program-wide continuity in career, academic, and social excellence

name: Benjamin Franklin Scholars
summary: The Benjamin Franklin Scholars seeks to provide support and supplemental experiences to dual degree students in the College of Engineering and College of Humanities and Social Sciences.

name: Alpha Epsilon Delta at NC State
summary: AED is the Pre-Health Honor Society at NCSU. We focus on serving the NCSU community by providing an avenue for those interested in healthcare to learn about the opportunities available to them, while meeting other like-minded students.

name: Voluntarios Ahora en Raleigh
summary: VOLAR is a Spanish language service program that bridges NC State to the local community, fosters cultural diversity, and challenges students with authentic linguistic practice.

name: Energy that Works
summary: The N.C. Clean Energy Technology Center is a UNC System-chartered Public Service Center administered by the College of Engineering at North Carolina State University.

name: Nuclear Engineering Graduate Student Association
summary: The purpose of the NE-GSA is to represent the graduate student body of the Nuclear Engineering department at NCSU. All graduate students in the NE department are members by default unless they opt-out.

name: Teacher Education & Learning Sciences Graduate Student Association
summary: Graduate student association for students in the Department of Teacher Education and Learning Sciences in the College of Education.

name: Lambda Phi Epsilon at NC State
summary: Lambda Phi Epsilon Fraternity, Inc. at NC State is an Asian-interest, but not exclusive, international fraternity that aims to promote leaders among men through wisdom, love, cultural heritage, courageous leadership, and authenticity.

name: Poultry Science Graduate Student Association
summary: The purpose of this Association shall be to promote the academic and professional development of graduate students in Poultry Science.

name: FREEDM Systems Center
summary: FREEDM Systems Center is the Future Renewable Electrical Energy Delivery and Management Systems Center, an NSF Engineering Research Center tasked with researching and developing the next generation technologies for the North American Power Grid.

name: Women in Business at NC State
summary: The Women in Business Club seeks to empower female students who are pursuing a degree or career in business. The club provides a platform within the Poole College of Management for women to voice their opinions and play an active role in the community.

name: Career Development Center
summary: Career Development Center

name: Electrical and Computer Engineering Ambassadors
summary:
Ambassadors represent the Electrical and Computer Engineering Department and NC State University as a whole, while exemplifying professionalism and campus pride.

Applications open each Spring semester.

name: College Mentors for Kids, Inc. at North Carolina State University
summary: College Mentors for Kids connects kids to college students. "Buddy pairs", consisting of one college and one elementary student, meet in groups for weekly activities on campus that focus on higher education and career, culture and diversity, and service.

name: American Society of Heating, Refrigerating, and Air-Conditioning Engineers at NC State
summary: The student chapter of the American Society of Heating, Refrigeration and Air Conditioning Engineers at NCSU (ASHRAE at NC State) hosts meetings with local companies and tours related to HVAC, and Energy Efficiency.

name: Consult Your Community at NC State
summary: CYC is a student-run nonprofit that organizes diverse teams to solve problems for small businesses and nonprofits in the Raleigh area. Students lead and complete pro-bono consulting projects that especially benefit women and minority business owners.

name: Data Analytics Club at NC State
summary: The Data Analytics Club provides students access to guest speakers and leaders from the industry for the purpose of building a community and spreading knowledge related to how data analytics impacts and is incorporated into various fields.

name: Coasts, Oceans, Ports and Rivers Institute Student Chapter at North Carolina State University
summary: The COPRI Student Chapter at NC State serves as a platform to bring together graduate students interested in coastal and ocean engineering and related fields, and to facilitate their academic and professional development.

name: American Association of Textile Chemists and Colorists
summary: AATCC is a professional organization with student chapters that provide testing standards and more importantly connections in the textile industry through various speakers and events. All majors at the Wilson College of Textiles are encouraged to join.

name: SolarPack
summary: Team of students working to build and race a solar car to be used for energy efficient vehicle competitions. The vehicle will be designed with US automotive design laws in mind and result in a street legal solar vehicle to be marketed and commercialized.

name: Black Graduate Student Association
summary: NC State’s Black Graduate Student Association promotes positive cultural awareness, social support, and professional/academic development for Black graduate and professional students.

name: Society for Health Systems
summary: The name of this organization is Institute of Industrial and Systems Engineers Society for Health Systems Committee. This committee will utilize the acronym SHS in all publicity, materials, and correspondence.

name: Engaged Service Scholars Program
summary: TBD

name: Canvas Club at NC State
summary: The Canvas Club is designed to bring painters together to paint in all mediums and styles, anywhere from beginners to advanced, to explore their creative interests, have fun painting, and develop their knowledge in a supportive and artsy environment.

name: Themed Entertainment Association at NC State
summary: Welcome to the Themed Entertainment Association @ NC State! Whether you're a passionate fan or aspiring to work in the industry, join us to share excitement, insider tips, career insights, and unforgettable park experiences. Come join us on this journey!

name: Young Democratic Socialists of America at NC State
summary: YDSA at NC State is a youth chapter of the Democratic Socialists of America (DSA). We are a leftist organization that aims to educate and organize the NC State and greater Raleigh community.

name: Zero Waste Wolves
summary: The Zero Waste Wolves aim to divert waste from landfills through campus projects, events, collaborations, and education. We love hosting events about how to be more sustainable on campus.

name: Global Corps
summary: Global Corps serves as an extension of the Global Programs Office in Poole to educate Poole students about the value of international experiences with a specific focus on study abroad programs.

name: Geospatial Graduate Student Organization
summary: This organization is designed to support students in their study of geospatial science and analytics.

name: Student Film Society at NC State
summary: SFS at NCSU is a club for those who are passionate about film and want to get involved in film discussion, appreciation and production. SFS is dedicated to sharing the love of film to students through weekly screenings and film-related opportunities!

name: Biomathematics Graduate Student Association
summary: We are the Graduate Student Association chapter representing the Biomathematics Graduate Program at NC State.

name: Women in Physics at NC State
summary:
The purpose of this organization is an intersectional approach to the advancement of
women in the physics department through fellowship, career development and academic
enhancement. We welcome people of all genders (cis, trans, and non-binary).

name: Forestry and Environmental Resources Leadership Board
summary: We are an on-campus organization focused on fostering community and making connections within the Department of Forestry and Environmental Resources through the creation of student-run events and programs for current FER students.

name: Forest Biomaterials GSA
summary: The mission of the FB GSA is to represent the graduate student body in the Department of Forest Biomaterials, providing a forum for students to express their opinions and promote professional development and fellowship among the students.

name: The National Parks Club at NC State
summary:
Together we foster student connections to nature and public lands through service and education, and recreation.  

Meetings are to be announced. Dates of upcoming events can be followed on our club Instagram page @nationalparksclub

name: Digital ShapRs at NC State University
summary: Digital ShapRs will equip Students with the mindset and tools needed to excel in and shape the multi-faceted digital future. We are about to experience the most profound, far-reaching, and interdisciplinary changes in its history. Let's be ready for it!!

name: Citizen Science Club at NC State
summary: Citizen Science Club was created to promote science as interdisciplinary endeavor, to welcome and involve students of any degree in scientific research as well as science communication, and to advocate for diversity in science.

name: Grand Challenges Student Organization
summary: The Grand Challenges Student Organization provides professional, academic, and social learning opportunities on engineering topics related to the Grand Challenges of Engineering.

name: Architectural Graduate Student Association
summary:
Architectural Graduate Student Association 

The purpose of this student organization is to facilitate the development of a strong graduate student community within the School of Architecture at the College of Design.

name: Society of Hispanic Professional Engineers (SHPE)
summary: SHPE changes lives by empowering the Hispanic community to realize its fullest potential and to impact the world through STEM awareness, access, support, and development. Through our membership, SHPE will inspire the next generation of STEM innovators.

name: NC State Chapter of the National Association for the Advancement of Colored People
summary: The mission of the National Association for the Advancement of Colored People (NAACP) is to ensure the political, educational, social, and economic equality of rights of all persons and to eliminate race-based discrimination.

name: F1RST at NC State
summary: F1RST is a student organization aimed at creating community among first-generation and low-income students at NC State.

name: National Society of Black Physicists at NC State
summary: Promote the professional well-being of African-American physicists and physics students within the NC State and the local community.

name: Biology Club at NC State University
summary: The purpose of the Biology Club is to promote interest in biological sciences, to increase awareness in biology, and to encourage fellowship among students and faculty in the Life Sciences through service and speakers.

name: STEM Education Graduate Student Association
summary: We represent master's and doctoral students from all programs within the STEM Education Department.

name: Puppetry Arts Club
summary: Puppetry Arts Club is dedicated to creating opportunities for all student artists. We welcome students who enjoy puppetry, performance, and stop motion animation, and more - our community is open to all creators.

name: MIx: Motivation and Inspiration
summary: MIx aims to promote inspiration through hosting TEDxNCState, a TED affiliated annual speaker series. With an opportunity for networking, participants will gain an interdisciplinary perspective showcasing how one can make a difference in the community.

name: NC State University
summary:
The purpose of the Student Association for Fire Ecology is to
provide students from diverse backgrounds with an open forum on fire ecology through which
research can be shared, networks formed and funding and information resources accessed.

name: Global Water, Sanitation, and Hygiene Student Chapter
summary: Global WaSH Student Chapter is a platform for promoting awareness about Global WaSH issues and research to students from multiple disciplines, and collaborating with non-profit organizations worldwide by bringing practical and affordable solutions.

name: Crossfit Club at NC State
summary: CrossFit Club seeks to unite a group of like-minded people through an environment which values community, health, and challenging yourself. CrossFit promotes holistic fitness through constantly varied, high-intensity, functional movements.

name: Financial Literacy Club at NC State
summary: The Financial Literacy Club at NC State aims to increase the financial literacy and financial independence of our members. Topics include economics, investments, credit/loans, wealth management, etc. The club is open to all students, regardless of major

name: The Textile Association of Graduate Students
summary: TAGS is the Wilson College of Textiles chapter of the NC State Graduate Student Association. TAGS represents the interest and concerns of graduate student of Wilson College to the GSA and Tompkins Textile Student Council.

name: Divine Youth Association
summary: DYA strives to create a divine relationship among the community through the principles of devotion to learn more about our way of life and way of thinking and lead ourselves towards a wholesome life with pure, powerful, progressive and sensitive mind.

name: African American Cultural Center
summary: The African American Cultural Center is an expressive and abundant haven for the NC State community.

name: Student Veterans Alliance of NC State
summary: NC State University’s Student Veteran Alliance is a nationally recognized chapter of Student Veterans of America. The SVA is a student group dedicated to advocating for and creating community among our student veterans and their families.

name: Mechanical and Aerospace Engineering Ambassadors at North Carolina State University
summary: The MAE Ambassadors foster interaction between the public, faculty, and undergraduate students associated with the MAE department at NC State.

name: Students of Life Sciences at NC State
summary: SOLS' purpose is to share the passion of service in life with the community through outreach and engagement and to build a community within life sciences, with special attention on engaging first-year students, on the basis of common interests.

name: Science Olympiad Alumni Organization at NC State
summary: We provide support at Science Olympiad tournaments as well as host our very own invitational through test writing, event leading, and general volunteering.. You do NOT need to be an SO alumni to join nor do you have to be a STEM major. We welcome all!

name: Out in Science, Technology, Engineering, and Math
summary: Out in Science, Technology, Engineering, and Mathematics (oSTEM) is a professional and social organization for LGBTQ+ students and allies in STEM fields.

name: Internal Audit Students Club
summary: The Internal Audit Students Club (IASC) is open to all accounting and non-accounting students who are interested in learning more about the internal audit, advisory and assurance professions.

name: Platform Magazine
summary: Platform Magazine is NC State's fashion and culture magazine. Platform Magazine is a creative community and a voice for artists and creatives from all corners of NC State's campus.

name: Her Campus NC State
summary: Her Campus is an international organization where college women write articles that are published on the online blog Her Campus. Join this group to write articles about anything you want, learn about business and social media, and make great friends!

name: Marine Science Club
summary: The objective of Marine Science Club is to promote marine science on NC State's campus by giving passionate community members a place to gather, as well as furthering their knowledge of marine science.

name: Pack Robotics at NC State
summary: Work with Vex Robotics at a college level and participate in VEX U competitions.

name: The Black Artist Coalition
summary: The goal of this student organization is to celebrate and uplift black artists across all artistic disciplines. We seek to create a space that honors the importance of art in black history and culture while providing a voice for the artists of today.

name: Kesem at NC State University
summary: Kesem is a nationwide community, driven by passionate college student leaders, that supports children through and beyond their parent's cancer. This ends with a week-long free summer camp for these children run by NC State students.

name: Technical Association of Pulp and Paper Industry
summary: We desire to promote education and social activities, to unite the students in the Pulp and Paper curriculum, and create an everlasting peer network.

name: Society for Advancement of Chicanos/Hispanics & Native Americans in Science
summary: SACNAS is an inclusive organization dedicated to fostering the success of Chicanos/Hispanics and Native Americans, from college students to professionals, in attaining advanced degrees, careers, and positions of leadership in STEM.

name: Crop and Soil Sciences Graduate Student Association
summary: Graduate student association for the Crop and Soil Sciences department

name: Underrepresented STEM Graduate Student Organization
summary: USGSA aims to improve diversity in STEM fields, provide support to students from underrepresented groups, and create a more inclusive community for NC State graduate students.

name: New Student Programs
summary: New Student Programs addresses the holistic needs of each new NC State student to create a foundation of success.

name: Fighting Game Club at NC State
summary: The FGC at NC State provides a community for people who take an interest in video games in the fighting genre, running events such as tournaments and casual meet-ups.

name: BattlePack Robotics Club at NC State
summary: We're a robotics club geared toward combat robotics! We design, prototype, and build robots to compete in local fighting competitions. We pride ourselves on our community, and our supportive team breeds ingenuity, leadership, and friendly competition.

name: Ultraviolet
summary: Student organization geared towards sapphic individuals at NC State!

name: Ag Institute Club
summary: The purposes of this organization shall be to develop those traits of character, personality, and leadership essential to the success of Agricultural Institute students in their chosen profession.

name: Alpha Pi Mu
summary: Alpha Pi Mu is a national honor society for Industrial and Systems Engineering students.

name: Student American Society Of Landscape Architects
summary: The Society’s mission is to advance landscape architecture through advocacy, communication, education, and fellowship.

name: ACM SIGGRAPH Student Chapter at NC State
summary: The ACM SIGGRAPH Student Chapter at NC State is an interest group for computer graphics, animation, computational media design, interactive techniques and related activities.

name: Music Makers Club
summary: A group for those interested in writing and producing original music of any kind. Pop, jazz, rap, noise... you name it, we make it.

name: Women in Electrical and Computer Engineering
summary: Our goal is to support women and non-binary students in the ECE department by providing opportunities in academic, professional, and personal development, while being inclusive of the greater community.

name: Association of Latino Professionals for America at NC State
summary: ALPFA works to empower and develop Latino men and women as leaders of character for the nation, in every sector of the global economy. By networking and professional leadership development opportunities with companies seeking Latinx talent.

name: Physiology Graduate Student Association -
summary: Student association for the Master of Physiology program.

name: ECE Graduate Student Association
summary: ECE GSA seeks to represent graduate students in the Department of Electrical & Computer Engineering.

name: Grappling Club at NC State University
summary: The purpose of this student organization is to teach members about grappling techniques and self-defense while emphasizing discipline, respect, and self-improvement.

name: EMGSA at NC State
summary: The Graduate Student Association for the Engineering Management Program at NC State. Responsible for taking care of the student body of the EM program, we offer events and support for the EM students.

name: Black Students Board at NC State
summary: The Black Students Board fosters unity among students of the African diaspora by providing a social outlet that creates space for holistic development, advocacy, and culturally focused programs.

name: Triangle Bengali Association at NC State
summary: The organization aims to unite all Bengali-speaking students at NCSU (India and Bangladesh). This will organize events and festivals indigenous to the Bengali community, like Bengali New Year, Durga Pujo, Saraswati Pujo, and host cultural programs.

name: Student-Made at NC State
summary: Student-Made will provide an outlet for creative student-entrepreneurs to connect with their campus community as they grow their business with the support of a network of artist who promote and sell work through pop-up events and an online store.

name: Student Affiliates of American Chemical Society
summary: The Student Affiliates of the American Chemical Society (SA-ACS) is the official ACS organization for undergraduate students interested in the chemical sciences.

name: Bioinformatics Graduate Student Association
summary: Graduate Student Association for the Bioinformatics Graduate Program. This program is comprised of graduate student pursuing studies in Bioinformatics at North Carolina State University.

name: Blockchain at NC State
summary: A student-led community at NCSU with opportunities for education, research, and project-building in blockchain technology.

name: National Science Teaching Association Preservice Teacher Chapter at NC State
summary: We aim to “Transform science education to benefit all through professional learning, partnerships, and advocacy."

name: French Ambassadors
summary: This group is for students interested in Communications and French Studies. Students will engage in club events and create social media content relating to French Studies on campus.

name: Roundabout Magazine
summary: The newest NC State Student Media outlet, Roundabout is a glossy general interest magazine that covers student life, arts, and culture.

name: Network of Enlightened Women at NC State
summary: Network of Enlightened Women is a national organization that cultivates a community of conservative women and expands intellectual diversity on college campuses through its focus on education, service, and career development.

name: Multicultural Student Affairs
summary: Multicultural Student Affairs (MSA) researches, designs, and implements culturally responsive initiatives, events and programs that promote the pursuit of academic success, retention, and graduation of students.

name: Women's Center
summary: Get Involved Page for the Women's Center

name: Sustainable Materials and Technology Student Association
summary:
SMTSA is an organization that is focused on professional development, team building and highlighting potential opportunities for students with Sustainable Materials and Technology majors, minors, and prospective students. 

Check us out @smtsa_!

name: Hack_NCState Planning Committee
summary: This student organization represents the Hack_NCState Planning Committee, which organizes and runs NC State's premier 24-hour hackathon where students compete to develop innovative software solutions.

name: Habitat for Humanity Campus Chapter at NC State
summary: Habitat for Humanity at NC State is a service organization affiliated with Habitat for Humanity of Wake County dedicated to the mission of establishing affordable housing in local communities.

name: NC State Real Estate
summary: The goal of Real Estate club is to expose students from all backgrounds to careers in real estate, trends in real estate, meet with industry professionals, and equip members with resources they need to succeed

name: Nigerian Students Association at NC State
summary: This is a student led organization that provides integration, interaction and mentorship support for prospective and current Nigerian students in North Carolina State University.

name: SolidWorks User Group at NC State
summary: The SOLIDWORKS User Group Network (SWUGN) is run for our users, by our users. Its mission is to empower people who use SOLIDWORKS and 3DEXPERIENCE Works products to collaborate with, learn from, and teach others.

name: Code Black
summary: Code Black is dedicated to solidifying the presence of black students in NC State's computer science department by providing opportunities for community development, professional success and departmental interactions.

name: National Student Speech Language Hearing Association at NC State
summary: The national student organization for pre-professionals studying communication sciences and disorders (CSD) that works to provide the tools to navigate academic careers and prepare for professional ones in the fields of speech pathology, audiology, etc.

name: Ornithology Club at NC State
summary: Provide a group for those who share a common interest in wild birds and ornithology. Email rpwanden@ncsu.edu for any questions you may have or if you want to join!

name: Zeta Tau Alpha
summary: ZTA sisterhood begins in college and extends far beyond four years. At Iota Phi, we are proud to be both a part of the Wolfpack and North Carolina Zetas! Since 1989, we have been home to some of the brightest and most wonderful women at North Carolina!

name: Student Parent Association
summary: The Student Parent Association (SPA) aims to connect, support, inform, and advocate for NC State students who are pregnant and/or parenting. Anyone is welcome to join (undergraduate students, graduate students, postdocs, etc.).

name: Students Supporting Free Moms at NC State
summary: The purpose of this student organization is to coordinate reservations, marketing, and working with administration to ensure the smoothness of Free Moms staying and bringing their love to NC State!

name: The National Association of Minority Landscape Architects at NC State University
summary: The National Association of Landscape Architects aims to increase minority representation at all levels of Landscape Architecture practice and academia through education, career development, and leadership.

name: Poole Student Advisory Board
summary: The Poole College Undergraduate Student Advisory Board (PSAB) supports and advises the Poole College of Management when developing innovative curricula and impactful educational programs and strategies for supporting undergraduate students.

name: Healthy Hands Initiative
summary: The Healthy Hands Initiative's mission is to provide sustainable clean water solutions to underserved families and students in India to reduce the rates the rates of prevalent diseases.

name: Kappa Alpha Pi at NC State University
summary: The vision of Kappa Alpha Pi Pre-Law and Government Fraternity at the North Carolina State University is to foster a community of individuals interested in pursuing careers within the legal and government fields.

name: Entomology Club
summary: A club targeted towards students with a current interest in insects or students interested in expanding their knowledge involving insects. This is a club for people interested in entomology as a hobby or a career.

name: History Grad Student Association
summary: The History Graduate Student Association at NC State is an organization devoted to the professional development of NC State's history and public history graduate students.

name: The Striking Club at NC State
summary: The Striking Club teaches its members technique centered around boxing, kickboxing, and Muay Thai. Whether your goals are more physical fitness, general recreation, or self defense, come to a class for a good lesson and workout

name: Students for Decarbonization at NCSU
summary: A group of students advocating for the decarbonization of NC State, including the secession of all fossil fuel investments, military industrial complex investments, and expansion of fossil fuel infrastructure.

name: User Interface User Experience Tech Club
summary:
UI UX Tech Club is a student organization that focuses on exploring user interfaces and user experiences centered around digital technology.
This includes accessibility, mobile phones, computers, tablets, wearables, and Virtual/Augmented/Mixed reality.

name: Comparative Medicine Institute Associate Members
summary: CAM seeks to encourage interdisciplinary research collaborations for graduate students and postdoctoral scholars through events hosted by the Comparative Medicine Institute.

name: Shutterbugs at NC State
summary:
Welcome to Shutterbugs at NC State, your own photography club! 📸🐺
Capture the moments that define your Wolfpack experience.
Join us for photography adventures, workshops, and a community passionate about visual storytelling

name: Quantitative Finance Club
summary: The Quantitative Finance Club is dedicated to promoting the leadership of individuals interested in the intersection of finance and technology, fostering an inclusive environment that encourages networking, mentoring, and learning opportunities.

name: NC State Chapter of the National Association for the Advancement of Colored People
summary: The NC State Chapter of the NAACP seeks to promote political activism, advance social and economic justice, and to foster a sense of cultural pride and campus ownership amongst minority students on the campus l and surrounding communities.

name: Korean Media Club
summary: The purpose of this student organization is to form a community for people who share the common interest of Korean media. This includes things like K-pop, K-dramas, and more. It will give these students a place to build connections based on shared likes.

name: RoboPack at NC State
summary: We are a competition team that designs, assembles, and tests a robot suited to perform an agricultural task for the Student Design Robotics Competition hosted by the American Society of Agricultural and Biological Engineers.

name: Forensic Science Club at NC State
summary: The purpose of this student organization is to allow students interested in forensic science to further their passions by creating an environment where they can meet like-minded peers and provide networking opportunities within the professional field.

name: Boxing Club at NC State
summary: Our goal is to spread the science of boxing to other students on campus, with the potential of letting students compete in collegiate competitions should they wish to.

name: Student Chapter of Carolina Adapts Toys for Children at NC State
summary: CATCH works to provide adapted toys to children with special needs who are unable to play with most commercially manufactured toys. Utilizing engineering, creativity, and innovation, we modify toys to give back to our local community.

name: Associated General Contractor
summary: The Associated General Contractors is committed to promoting construction, student involvement, academics, philanthropy, and overall student wellbeing. The organization accomplishes its mission through meetings, volunteering, student competitions, etc.

name: Jawaani at NC State
summary: Jawaani is an A Capella group geared towards bringing together a wide range of cultures from different parts of the world through music. Our mission is to create a fun, professional environment for singers to come together and immerse in creating music.

name: Ethnobiology Club at NC State University
summary: The Ethnobiology Club aims to bring together the student body across disciplines to better understand biocultural diversity, how society interacts with the ethnoecological relationships of the world, and to promote the research, education, and training.

name: ISSA Chapter at NC State
summary: ISSA is the Community of choice for International Cybersecurity Professionals dedicated to advancing individual growth, managing technology risk and protecting critical information and infrastructure.

name: Student Conduct Board at NC State
summary: The NC State Student Conduct Board is an organization that seeks to create a safe, respectful, and inclusive campus community by upholding university and department values. The Board adjudicates conduct violations on behalf of the NC State community.

name: Neuroscience Club at NC State
summary: The purpose of this student organization is to promote interest in neuroscience at North Carolina State University, inform career and involvement experiences within the field, and provide opportunities to build relationships with faculty and students.

name: Queer Educator's Alliance
summary: The purpose of this student organization is to provide an inclusive community dedicated to fostering meaningful discussions, sharing experiences, and creating a sense of belonging for Queer-identifying education majors at NC State.

name: Girl’s Anime and Gaming Club
summary: A place for girls and others to feel safe and nerd out

name: Professional Engineers of North Carolina
summary: A college chapter of the professional organization, Professional Engineers of North Carolina (PENC), this organization serves to inform member about the P.E. and connect them with professionals in their perspective field.

name: Actuarial Science Club at NC State
summary: The purpose of the NC State Actuarial Science Club is to spread important information regarding the career of an actuary through the lens of both the Casualty Actuarial Society (CAS) or the Society of Actuaries (SOA).

name: Student Leadership Council
summary: FREEDM SLC seeks to represent the undergraduate and graduate students at the FREEDM Systems Center in the Department of Electrical & Computer Engineering at North Carolina State University.

name: Beta Gamma Sigma Chapter at NC State
summary: Beta Gamma Sigma is an international business honor society with over 600 collegiate and 50 alumni chapters in the US and abroad.  BGS Global Headquarters is in St. Louis, Missouri. The NC State Chapter of Beta Gamma Sigma was formed in 2001.

name: Alpha Psi Omega (Psi Kappa Cast)
summary: A theatre honors society with the object of promoting respect for, providing service to, and advancing the performing arts at North Carolina State University.

name: Sales Club at NC State
summary: The Sales Club at NC State aims to foster a dynamic community of students interested in the field of sales and business development.

name: Beyond the Pack
summary: Beyond the Pack is North Carolina State University’s first digital-only, student-led independent news organization, providing coverage on issues that extend beyond the University’s immediate scope.

name: Poole Undergraduate Student Hub Advocates
summary: PUSH Advocates foster inclusiveness in PCOM by celebrating diversity and empowering students to embrace differences. Through advocacy and engagement, we create a supportive hub where students feel welcome, build connections, and find belonging.

name: Fiber Society Student Chapter at NC State
summary: NCSFS promotes the advancement of fiber science by offering resources and opportunities that foster learning, collaboration, and innovation among its members.

name: Design Council at NC State College of Design
summary: We are a student-led organization that advocates for all College of Design students to faculty and staff while fostering community through events.

name: ORaCEL Social Association
email: we do not have an email address yet, but vice president is bvassem@ncsu.edu
summary: ORaCel Social Association is founded to improve the well-being and interactions of the members. By creating regular social and networking events for the ORaCEL community.

name: The Scholars Network at NC State
summary: The Scholars Network at NC State seeks to foster a sense of community for Black/African-American Students within the College of Social Sciences and Humanities, and to contribute to their professional and scholarly development.

name: Women's Coalition
summary: We are an organization focused on community outreach, sisterhood, and service. We aim to create a safe space for women to discuss women's issues and the female experience.

name: Clash of Clans Club
summary: Clash of Clans Club at NC State organizes meetings, events, and more. We bring together all Clash enthusiasts to grow as players and as a community.

name: International Relations Club
summary: Club dedicated to fostering understanding of international relations and conflict. Focuses on an academic approach to this issue, including the larger historical questions at play. Hosts networking events with those in International Relations Community.

name: Ghana Students' Association at NC State
summary: Fostering a vibrant Ghanaian community at NC State by facilitating integration, encouraging interaction, and providing mentorship for prospective and current students, alumni, and all campus members with an interest in Ghanaian culture and experiences.

name: Eco Design Outreach Club
summary: The purpose of this student organization is to bring together students from diverse areas of study to learn and collaborate. Our goal is to create projects that are focused on sustainable design to improve areas on campus and provide hands-on learning

name: Society of Entrepreneurs at NC State
summary: The Society of Entrepreneurs is a place for anyone interested in anything entrepreneurship-related. Come network, find other founders to work with, learn how to start a business, pitch competitions, and meet tons of motivated people.

name: Health Mentor Association at NC State
summary: An organization aimed to provide volunteering and mentorship to prehealth students on campus.

name: Artificial Intelligence & Us
summary: AI & Us is a student club exploring AI through an everyday humanities lens. We focus on how AI affects ethics, culture, and us! No STEM or tech background needed, just curiosity & a desire to understand AI's impact on the human experience & vice versa.

name: Classic Robotics Lab
summary: Classic Robotics Lab is a student-led organization at NC State focused on designing, building, and researching advanced robotic systems.

name: College of Natural Resources Community Connect
summary: We aim to foster an inclusive environment and establish a 1:1 mentorship program to connect new CNR students with professional development and experiential learning opportunities through authentic friendships.

name: Harmful Algal Blooms, People, & the Environment
summary: Harmful Algal Blooms, People, & the Environment (HABPE) is a student-led organization at NC State that raises awareness of harmful algal blooms in North Carolina. We connect science with community through outreach, education, and inclusive engagement.

name: International City/County Management Association (ICMA) Student Chapter at NC State University
summary: The purpose of this student organization is to cultivate student interest in and commitment to the field of local government and public service. Our chapter seeks to provide a platform for undergraduate and graduate students across all disciplines.

name: Pack Cancer Organization
summary: The Pack Cancer Organization engages college students in the fight against cancer through education, community, and giving.

name: Pack Performance Leaders
summary: An organization for students currently enrolled in a course within the Department of Performing Arts and Technology who seek to actively support and contribute to the growth of the department.

name: Second Chance Initiative at NC State University
summary: The Second Chance Initiative (SCI) organization at NC State University aims to inform and engage NCSU students, faculty, and staff about prison education efforts and the broader issues faced by individuals impacted by the justice system.

name: Spectra at NC State
summary: Association for LGBTQIA+ mathematicians.

name: The Silicon Den: Tapeout Club at NC State
summary: A student-led ECE organization at NC State focused on digital (RTL) and analog (layout/schematic) IC design. Members gain hands-on experience in full-chip ASIC design, verification, and mixed-signal integration from concept to tapeout.

name: Kendo Club at NC State
summary: Kendo is a sword fighting martial art originating in Japan. In kendo you wear protective equipment and keiko (spar/ practice) with others. Kendo is very standardized, so there is only one official system and ranks are recognized all around the world.

name: GI Health and Advocacy Club
summary: A student organization focused on raising awareness of GI health, supporting students with chronic GI conditions, educating the campus community, and advocating for better policies and research funding.

name: Bilingual Education Student Organization at NC State
summary: BESO at NC State supports future bilingual educators by promoting advocacy, networking, and professional growth. As a NABE chapter, we aim to advance bilingual/multilingual education and equity in schools and communities.

name: Construction & Development Club at NC State University
summary: The Construction & Development Club at NC State connects students interested in construction, civil engineering, and sustainable development. Members work on hands-on projects, network with professionals, and gain real-world experience in the industry.

name: Fiction Book Club at NC State University
summary: Every week, members will meet to discuss fiction books. There will be one book per month that the members voted for. The goal of club is to encourage discussion, literacy, and build a community full of book lovers!

name: First Gen Business Collective at NC State
summary: The First Gen Business Collective is dedicated to empowering first-generation business students by breaking down barriers to success. We provide access to professional development, financial and academic resources, and community support.

name: Lions Club at NC State
summary: The NC State Lions Club is a student-led service organization dedicated to improving campus and community life through volunteer work, leadership development, and global humanitarian service as part of Lions Clubs International.

name: 1911 Consulting
summary: 1911 Consulting provides consulting services to various departments and faculty initiatives across the university in order to increase efficiency and output of programs.

name: National Ground Game At NC State
summary:
The purpose of National Ground Game At NC State is to serve as the official NC State chapter of 
National Ground Game (NGG). Our mission: take back the youth vote, train organizers, and deliver measurable results at the ballot box.

name: Association for Computing Machinery @ NC State
summary: Promoting excellence, education and opportunities for students in the computing field.

name: ITS ON US at NC STATE
summary: A student movement designed to change the culture around sexual assault on campus.

name: The National Society of Black Women in Medicine at NC State
summary: The National Society of Black Women in Medicine is committed to supporting current and future healthcare professionals and scientists by promoting attainability through educational resources, unity and mentorship.

name: Global Health & Education Leadership Club at NC State
summary: The Global Health & Education Leadership Club at NC State is a student organization focused on global health, education, and service. We partner with Operation Smile and BlinkNow to fundraise, raise awareness, and support global initiatives.

name: SHPEtinas at NC State
summary: The purpose of SHPEtinas is to build a community that empowers women in STEM and help them navigate through a male-dominated work and learning environment while accomplishing their own goals.

name: Middle Grades English Language Arts and Social Studies Club
summary: The MSL Club is a student-led organization, partnering with the College of Education, that connects middle grades language arts & social studies education majors through community-building, mentorship, and professional development opportunities.

name: The Climate Journal Club
summary: A discussion-based club focused on climate change issues outside the scope of STEM classes. This club is primarily composed of natural science graduate students but is open to all NCSU students.

name: North Carolina Access Project
summary: To serve as North Carolina’s source for nonpartisan, easy-to-understand political information that empowers and educates citizens from Dare to Cherokee County.

name: SGI Campus Club at NC State
summary: NC State SGI is a campus organization for students interested in the principles and activities of Soka Gakkai International, a global lay Buddhist organization, providing a space for dialogue, growth, and respect for the dignity of all individuals.

name: Comic Book Club at NC State
summary: A space where students can gather to discuss all kinds of comic books of all genres. We just want to talk about our shared interest in a welcoming, safe space. :)

name: Windpack at NC State
summary: For a national DOE competition, we build a model wind turbine and develop a wind turbine project plan.

name: NC State Student Chapter of INFORMS
summary: This is the student body of INFORMS at NC State University. INFORMS is the foremost organization of operations research, analytics and management science researchers and practitioners.
